questions.question: What is the primary data ingestion path?
questions.answer: The primary ingestion path starts from source.ecom.raw_products, then moves through `models/staging/stg_products.sql` into model.stg_products.

citations.description: Dataset `source.ecom.raw_products` is defined or produced from this file.
Column renaming (sku→product_id, name→product_name) and transformation logic (cents_to_dollars, coalesce for boolean flags)

questions.question: What are the 3-5 most critical output datasets/endpoints?
questions.answer: The most critical output datasets are `model.customers` via `models/marts/customers.sql`, `model.metricflow_time_spine` via `models/marts/metricflow_time_spine.sql`, `model.products` via `models/marts/products.sql`, `model.supplies` via `models/marts/supplies.sql`, `model.locations` via `models/marts/locations.sql`. They are prioritized because they are final sinks produced by the highest-ranked modules.

citations.description: Aggregates lifetime order counts, spending metrics, and identifies repeat buyers
Generates base dates using dbt_date.get_base_dates for time series analysis
Selects all fields from stg_products without transformation logic
Selects all fields from stg_supplies without transformation logic
SQL selects all data from stg_locations model indicating it's creating a standardized view for downstream consumption

questions.question: What is the blast radius if the most critical module fails?
questions.answer: If `models/staging/stg_products.sql` fails, its direct outputs model.stg_products stop updating, and the downstream blast radius includes model.customers, model.order_items, model.orders, model.products.

citations.description: Column renaming (sku→product_id, name→product_name) and transformation logic (cents_to_dollars, coalesce for boolean flags)

questions.question: Where is the business logic concentrated vs. distributed?
questions.answer: Business logic is most concentrated in `mart` modules and then spreads across `staging`, `config`, `macro`.

citations.description: semantic_models section defines order_item entity with revenue measures and food/drink categorization logic
Macro definition with adapter-specific implementations for converting cents to dollars: default__cents_to_dollars, postgres__cents_to_dollars, bigquery__cents_to_dollars, fabric__cents_to_dollars
Aggregates lifetime order counts, spending metrics, and identifies repeat buyers

questions.question: What has changed most frequently in the last 90 days (git velocity map)?
questions.answer: No high-velocity files were detected in the configured git-velocity window. This run uses the Surveyor velocity window, so the answer is limited to the saved run configuration.
